description: Letter from Labrat b. Yishaq from Qayrawan, to Yosef b. Dunash, Fustat, in the handwriting of Nissim b. Yiṣḥaq b. al-Sahl. Both the sender and the addressee are probably from Fez, and have business with the Maghreb and Egypt. Labrat might be Nissim’s brother. The writer asks the addressee to send money that he owes another merchant, Avraham b. Barukh, which is waiting for the money before he can return to Spain. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #228) VMR. Mentions a ship "al-markab al-mubārak", probably referring to a state owned ship or owned privately by the ruler.
description_he: מכתב מלברט בן יצחק, קיירואן, ליוסף בן דונש, פוסטאט, על שליחת כסף שחייב לאברהם בן ברוך ועל ספינה של השלטון
